tools.Name: Hermes Agent
tools.Description: A self-improving AI agent with a built-in learning loop that can manage skills, memory, and automation across various platforms.
tools.Use_Case: Personal automation, cross-platform assistant (Telegram, Discord, Slack), and creating custom skills through natural language.

tools.Name: MarkItDown
tools.Description: A lightweight Python utility for converting various file formats (PDF, Office documents, audio, images) into Markdown.
tools.Use_Case: Preparing diverse documents for ingestion into LLM contexts while preserving structure.

tools.Name: VoxCPM2
tools.Description: A tokenizer-free, end-to-end TTS system that generates high-quality, 48kHz audio and supports voice cloning and voice design.
tools.Use_Case: Multilingual speech synthesis, creative voice design, and high-fidelity voice cloning.
